subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy decided to pair Zenvon with Veyra and Maela with Pip to form two teams capable of operating in darkness.
source_quote: Decided to pair Zenvon with Veyra and Maela with Pip to form two teams capable of operating in darkness

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy agreed to the revised pairing suggested by Kostadis.

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy decided to bypass the three wolves and proceed toward the snake rather than engage them.
source_quote: Decided to bypass the three wolves and proceed toward the snake rather than engage them

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy attempted a deception check, claiming the party had heard heroic stories about Glasstaff and came to meet him.
source_quote: Attempted a deception check, claiming the party had heard heroic stories about Glasstaff and came to meet him

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy turned on a light source, removing the darkness disadvantage for subsequent turns.
source_quote: Turned on a light source (using his action), removing the darkness disadvantage for subsequent turns

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy confirmed the potion of healing can be used by any party member, not just Zenvon.
source_quote: Confirmed the potion of healing can be used by any party member, not just Zenvon

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy initially suggested hiding near the cleared goblin area.
source_quote: Initially suggested hiding near the cleared goblin area

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy chose Short Sword as the second Weapon Mastery selection, preferring a dual-weapon melee playstyle.
source_quote: Chose Short Sword as the second Weapon Mastery selection, preferring a dual-weapon melee playstyle

subject: Sildar Hallwinter
fact: Sildar Hallwinter warned that Klarg the bugbear was not killed and remains a threat deeper in the cave.
source_quote: Warned that Klarg the bugbear was not killed and remains a threat deeper in the cave

subject: Pip
fact: Pip instructed the party not to make fires.
